{{Expand}}

{{Infobox artifact
| name = Thorngrass pill
| introduced = Unsouled
}}

== Unsouled ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|The thorngrass pill does not affect the spirit.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c16">''Unsouled'', chapter 16</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|The thorngrass pill can cause tingling around injuries.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c17">''Unsouled'', chapter 17</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Unsouled]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle artifacts]]
